text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Hi Kato, 

graphics/libexif don't respect NOPORTEXAMPLES and NOPORTDOCS. Please fix 
it and submit a followup to this PR. Look at the Porters Handbook for 
instructions. 

http://i386.miwibox.org/index.php?action=describe_port&id=525 

Thanks!
